title: oxera pulchella subsp. grandiflora
intro: Oxera pulchella subsp. grandiflora, also known as the large-flowered oxera, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and carminative effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including relieving nausea, reducing inflammation, and providing antioxidant properties. Oxera pulchella subsp. grandiflora can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
